mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role (role_id, role_name, role_level, description, created_by) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{roleName}, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(role_level) + 1 FROM tb_role), 1), #{description}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
